summary:
MINISTRY AND SPIRITUAL REFLECTIONS: Brandon shares his personal spiritual reflections, describing a vision of a distressed woman in a boat, which he interprets as a metaphor for individuals struggling with depression and spiritual isolation. He emphasizes the importance of a sincere relationship with God over the pressures of running large, financially burdened ministries. Brandon recounts his own emotional response to these spiritual struggles, expressing a desire to maintain his authenticity and focus on helping others rather than prioritizing institutional success. He also describes an internal experience of witnessing a foot-washing event, framing it as a lesson in humility and grace for religious leaders.

GEOPOLITICAL OBSERVATIONS: Brandon discusses various international events and political developments. He mentions diplomatic meetings between Turkey and Poland, and expresses concern over the use of long-range missiles in the Ukraine-Russia conflict. He comments on remarks made by international figures, including Putin's statements on Western involvement and Israel's push for independent armament capabilities. Furthermore, Brandon touches on domestic issues, citing reports of political shifts in New York, instances of antisemitism, and his feelings regarding the activities of certain US politicians and the socioeconomic situation in Cuba.

ELECTION INFLUENCES AND POLITICAL VISIONS: Brandon details a series of political visions he has experienced, emphasizing his interpretations of the US political landscape. He describes imagery associating Minnesota political figures, such as Tim Walz and Ilhan Omar, with symbolic ties to foreign influence, representing this through the imagery of a toxic substance with a silver lining. Additionally, Brandon recounts visions concerning election integrity in Georgia, mentioning Stacey Abrams and a symbolic map. He also saw a vision suggesting potential political challenges for Donald Trump, describing it metaphorically as eagle wings being clipped by legislative and judicial bodies, alongside changes in the Supreme Court involving Clarence Thomas and Sonia Sotomayor.

INTERCESSORY PRAYER AND FUTURE OUTLOOK: Brandon outlines his prayers for various national and international figures. He shares his practice of praying for the safety and health of Donald Trump and his family, as well as for the protection of domestic infrastructure, law enforcement, and religious institutions. Drawing from his visions, Brandon expresses a hopeful outlook for the future of his faith community, describing a metaphorical metamorphosis of a caterpillar into a vibrant butterfly, which he interprets as a sign of spiritual renewal and positive transformation emerging from periods of hardship in states like Minnesota.
rawData: [June 24, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/ig_1Spghkgg]-[Well, good evening everybody. Thank you for joining us again tonight. I got this today that will get rid of every fly. Somebody sent this to me; I thought that was the coolest thing ever. I told Diana I said, "Guess what? I'm the Terminator." So, we're going to go after the flies today. If there's a fly, he's dead. So, I'm excited about it. I loaded it with the salt from the Himalaya and Himalayan salt crystals. I can see it go, and so it's fun to play with. I've been shooting at flies all the time. You know, I shot myself with it; it stings really bad. But I thought, yeah, that was fun. So, whoever sent that, I appreciate that. That was kind of you. So, we don't have fly problems no more. In fact, I've been looking for flies. I said, leave the door open. Leave the door open. Let's do this. All right. Well, last night was different. You know, I've prayed about that all day today. What I saw about the person in the boat, Diana and I, we discussed it. We had to run errands and do some things, and I told her, we were talking, she went through all the visions and things the Lord has been showing me. She asked me about certain things today. It was interesting because Diana doesn't usually ever do that. But she said, "As Joseph saw seven fat cows and seven skinny cows, did it have anything to do with a cow?" The cow represented seven plentiful years and seven bad years. It was the Lord talking about two shmita cycles. It started with two shmita cycles, two seven-year periods. That's the point I say, because I was the reason why I brought it up. I've been thinking and meditating on the visions the Lord shows me, that I saw a girl in a boat and she was in the Caribbean. It was a white woman and she was on a boat that the sail was messed up and she was sailing for fun. I could see her last night bobbing up and down in the water as a storm on the sea was happening. She was bobbing up and down and she was crying and she was sitting on the deck of this white boat and it was moving up and down; she was sobbing because she had no way of communicating to people to tell them that she was in distress and she was too far out for the Coast Guard to hear her or for them to be watching for her. She was too far out. But she came from Florida. There was something about her in the Caribbean that she got into; something happened and I was interceding for this. I was thinking is this a metaphor? As I was praying into that, I was seeing people behind their computers last night and they were saying, "Does God really care about me? I feel all alone. I have no family. I come, I work 8 to 5, I'm by myself all the time," and they were thinking about harming themselves physically. They were feeling that they were completely lost. Does God really care about me? Does God really understand that I'm hurting right now? Does he even care that I am? And as I was praying, I could feel the hopelessness of these individuals last night, that they felt like there was no hope for their life. There was such a depression and such a sense of not self-worth, so inadequate. It was so heavy. And as I was praying, I saw a cork bobbing down in the water and then it became a person. And as they began to sink into the water and the water was about to take their last breath in their life, they would shoot up to the top and they would get just enough air just to sustain them to keep their body alive. Almost like the bread of affliction. And I could see them dropping back down and trying to fight to come up to the air again. And they were fighting for everything they had to have just one more breath of air. And that's the way they were living. If I could just get one more breath of air. And they go, [gasps] and they go back down. And it was very heavy. As I'm saying this, it's heavy. But I went over the visions and I thought, is this girl in the ocean, is this a type of shadow of where people are spiritually, of where they are with their relationship with the Lord? That God is wanting you to come out of the barely getting by, the survival stage, and come into thriving. He wants you to thrive the rest. He wants you to be the head and not the tail. Above and not beneath. Go through and not go under. To have that relationship with him that you say, "Hello, Father. How are you doing today?" That you become intimate with God. When you get real with God, I say it all the time. When you get real with God, God will become real to you. Stop being fake. I went over all the major ministries, all the people that I've talked to on the phone that I used to dream to talk to, and you realize how human they truly are. That they are just a vessel that said yes, just like me. And how I have strategically done everything the Lord has told me to do to get to where I'm at right now and where he tells me I'm going. And how I don't ever want the pressure of this to ever choke out the relationship that I have with him. It's more valuable than anything else. It's like I told one minister, I don't care about the White House. I don't care about certain stuff. In fact, I think it's a joke. I talk to the King of Kings and I see angels. They come and visit. That's the thing to me. Sitting at the dryer and losing yourself with prayer, and that's what I did. Folding laundry, helping Diana, doing things like that, seeking him and finding him. All this other—I want to call it crap. Sorry, but it is, the spiritual stuff, all the requests, all that, it's crap. It's a distraction. I talked to people across this camera because the Lord told me to. But I thought about it a lot today. I thought about the pressure of ministry. I have some ministers, I talk to them. They got 40 and 50 staff, 250 staff. They got huge overhead. They got huge bills, huge. And if they don't have a certain amount of money come in through their ministry, they're in trouble. So they push books. They push things. And I'm not criticizing. That's just not where my heart is. I just want to be Brandon. I don't want the pressure of all that with having families and being responsible. You got to make sure they got their bills paid by your ministry paying their salary and you got all that. And I go, "Good Lord." And Diana goes, "Brandon, do you see we can say whatever I want to say?" And they look at me as a wild hair. I say what he says, but I have no fear of it. And most people go, "My god, we got the emails. Are you kidding me? Do you say all that?" I said, "I have nothing to fear because I have nothing to lose." If we still do our business and do things on the side there, if this gets turned off, I truly mean that. I did this all for the Lord. There's nothing behind it other than I am sold out to Jesus. If the channel gets turned off, they silenced me last night again. Then everybody had to go, 'Hey, we can't hear you anymore.' YouTube got ticked off, and we get these things. They say, 'You can't say that,' and they mute me. Hello, YouTube. But I'm bold as a lion, and I'll say what He says to say, and I don't care. I did the best I could, and I'll stand before Him and say, 'Lord, I gave You everything I got.' And that might mean that Diana goes, 'You have more, you know what, rocks than I've ever seen anybody have in my life.' Honey, I can't believe some of the stuff you say, but I say it because I don't fear you; I fear Him. I'm sold out. I was going over the visions and going over things. I think, my God, I've said some things on the internet. They blotted me out last night, and I couldn't figure out why. Nobody could hear me. They muted me, and they wanted you to leave. They didn't want you hearing what I was saying anymore, so you had to refresh it and come back in. For a lot of you—that thousand-plus where it all dropped—so it is what it is. Everybody lost sound because YouTube didn't like what I said last night. And so, am I afraid of that? Not even a little bit. I didn't get myself here; I didn't do any of it. He did it all. Everything I have—I lived in an 800-square-foot house for 17 years of my life with cockroaches and meth dealers all around me. I've been at the bottom of the barrel, and now the Lord's blessed me. I look around and say, 'I've had little, and I'm not moved by any of it.' I lived with nothing, barely scrimping on food stamps. You understand, when you are sold out to Him and there's nothing that you've done in your life to take credit for, you are able to be really free, because I was happy then and I'm happy now. I love the Lord, but like I said, my biggest thing is always praying with my kids, teaching them how to pray, teaching them how to deep dip in the rivers. My biggest thing is to teach Paisley. I see the intercessory prayer gifts on her. The Lord told me she's going to start to see as she's seeing. There are things that I don't talk about, but my little girl is walking in the supernatural at ten years old, and she's already starting to see over and she's able to do things. And I impart. I lay hands on her and I impart. I teach her how to jump in that river as a child. I do the same with Braden. And if Megan were not overcoming, I would do the same for her, but right now she's overcoming. I still pray for her all the time, but it's not like I try to say, 'Honey, will you see?' because she wouldn't tell us if she could. I'm sure she does. I'm free tonight. As it clicked today while we were going over the visions and what the Lord has done, there are things that the Lord shows me that we've prayed away. I know we've stopped things by the Spirit of God, praying for things and interceding for this man in Colombia. I said, 'Lord, I haven't had a lot of visions in the last couple of days. You haven't shown me what's going on.' He said, 'I told you when I don't show you something to pray over what I've given you. I gave you something that you just see—it's amazing—and you just cast it aside and keep marching.' He said, 'It's like going at Christmas time and you're opening up gifts and you go, "Where's the next one? Where's the next one?" and you don't realize what you just unwrapped.' What did He give you? Well, hold on a minute. You're a child because you're so excited about all the stuff under the tree. He keeps giving you all this stuff and you're not looking at what He gave you out of the box. You're taking it for granted because you put it aside and forgot that you even opened it because you're looking at what's ahead. He said, 'Stop looking at what's underneath the tree and look at what I already gave you to unwrap and what I'm telling you to pray over.' I'm trying to tell you to pray over the man in Colombia because he's going to lose two friends, somebody really close to him with a beard, and you can pray about this. I thought, 'Can I stop it? Don Jr. is bold and his life is in danger. And the Lord said, 'Pray for him. Pray for Don Jr.' So, instead of opening another package—because there's so much more the Lord wants to show us—look at what He has given me and open the gift of a vision, because you don't have control over it; Jesus does. It's a gift. You open it up and don't put the gift over here and say, 'Where's my next one?' I stopped and I looked and I said, 'Let's be thankful that He gave us the warning ahead of time to pray over Don Jr., to pray over the man in Colombia, to pray over Cuba, and to pray over President Trump to make it across the finish line, that he finishes strong, that the 25th Amendment does not happen, that the Black judge in the Supreme Court does not die of prostate cancer or heart disease, that he will stay strong, that his life will not be cut off because of cancer of the prostate: Clarence Thomas.' Pray over voices to be accurate. Don't criticize; pray for them—the prophetic voices, the ones that truly have a heart after God and are just missing it because they're human. Don't go, 'Well, they're false prophets,' and everyone pick on people. Instead, just see it and go, 'Listen, is their heart truly pure and after God and they're just off track a little bit?' versus if it's malicious. There are some people that are just good people and just need a little fine-tuning. Everybody needs a tuning. The rabbit ears get fuzzy sometimes because of the cares of life—like I told you, the responsibility of having fifty staff, 100, or 200 people in your church, and you have all this stuff going on. You have all this responsibility, and the antennas get a little crossed up sometimes because you have all the cares of life on top of you and families depending on you. So, in the midst of all the cares of life in a huge ministry, from what I'm learning, have a little grace. Pray for some folks; they need help. Pray for their finances. Why? We're all on the same mission to save that which was lost—to tell people that Jesus Christ is coming. And some people just get a little bit weary in well-doing, and they just need some help.
